overall.description: First-person gameplay from Fallout 4 showing the player navigating the Pip-Boy wrist computer interface before walking through a sunlit post-apocalyptic wasteland featuring abandoned vehicles, electrical towers, and a large ruined industrial complex.

events.description: player switches from QUEST tab to MAP tab on the Pip-Boy interface
player scrolls and pans the local map view to examine the surrounding area

agents.ego_description: standing still while navigating the Pip-Boy menu system, using the dial to switch between quest log and map view

entered.detail: wrist-mounted computer interface with bulky metallic casing and green monochrome CRT screen
green glowing interface showing STAT, INV, DATA, MAP, RADIO tabs and quest information
gloved hand gripping the side of the Pip-Boy device

segments.scene_description: The player views the Pip-Boy interface in first-person, navigating from the quest log to the local map. The green monochrome screen dominates the view while the player's gloved hand holds the device steady against a blurred outdoor background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined post-apocalyptic urban street with industrial debris and abandoned vehicles

events.description: player closes the Pip-Boy device, revealing the first-person view of the wasteland environment
player walks past the abandoned pink convertible car on the right side of the road
player passes underneath the suspended traffic lights hanging across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cracked asphalt road through the wasteland, navigating around debris and abandoned vehicles while approaching the large industrial structure

entered.detail: large metal lattice electrical tower with multiple cross-arms and hanging wires
rusted vintage pink convertible with broken windows and flat tires sitting on the roadside
traffic signals hanging from wires strung between utility poles across the road
massive ruined industrial complex with spherical storage tanks and skeletal metal framework
wooden electrical poles with transformers and tangled wires lining the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The player walks forward through a desolate post-apocalyptic street, passing an abandoned pink convertible and moving under suspended traffic lights. The cracked asphalt road is lined with dead trees and utility poles, leading toward a massive ruined industrial complex in the distance. High-voltage transmission towers dominate the right side of the frame as the camera moves steadily through the bright, sunlit wasteland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from the intimate, technical glow of a wrist-mounted interface to a wide, sun-drenched expanse of a ruined city. It begins with a close-up of the Pip-Boy's green monochrome screen as a gloved hand navigates from the quest log to the local map against a blurred backdrop. As the device is lowered, the view opens up to a desolate post-apocalyptic street where the camera moves steadily forward across cracked asphalt. The scene then expands past an abandoned pink convertible and suspended traffic lights, passing under towering high-voltage transmission towers and dead trees. Finally, the path leads the camera deeper into the bright wasteland, heading directly toward a massive, ruined industrial complex looming in the distance.
